# 1 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addiw sp, zero, 0x7ff
addi  sp, sp, 1
# Result: sp = 0xfffffffffffff800

# 2 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkr
li t0, 3
csrw mseccfg, t0
csrr a0, mseccfg
andi a0, a0, 0x3
addi a1, a1, 2047
addi a1, a1, 953
# Result: a0 = 0

# 3 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkra
li t0, 3
csrw mseccfg, t0
csrr a0, mseccfg
andi a0, a0, 0x3
addi a1, a1, 2047
addi a1, a1, 953
# Result: a0 = 0

# 4 # Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addiw sp, zero, 0x7ff
addi  sp, sp, 1
# Result: sp = 0xfffffffffffff800

# 5 # Extension Must Be Active: Zkraqq
li t0, 3
csrw mseccfg, t0
csrr a0, mseccfg
andi a0, a0, 0x3
addi a1, a1, 2047
addi a1, a1, 953
# Result: a0 = 0
